mapper.select: select id as id, image_url as imageUrl from `t_nail_order` where FIND_IN_SET (id,#{id})
mapper.update: update `t_nail_order` set username=#{username}, mobile=#{mobile}, step=#{step}, current_step=#{currentStep}, image_url=#{imageUrl}, comefrom=#{comefrom}, nail_config_id=#{nailConfigId}, nail_count_detail=#{nailCountDetail}, height=#{height}, width=#{width}, update_date = now() where id=#{id}
mapper.select: select id as id ,username as username ,mobile as mobile ,step as step ,current_step as currentStep ,image_url as imageUrl ,comefrom as comefrom ,nail_config_id as nailConfigId ,nail_count_detail as nailCountDetail ,height as height ,width as width ,create_date as createDate ,update_date as updateDate from `t_nail_order` where id = #{id} order by id limit 1

select id as id ,username as username ,mobile as mobile
,current_step as currentStep ,image_url as imageUrl ,comefrom as comefrom ,nail_config_id as nailConfigId
,height as height ,width as width ,create_date as createDate ,update_date as updateDate from `t_nail_order` where id = #{id} order by id limit 1
SELECT * FROM t_nail_order t ORDER by id desc
